name: SMS Screen Golf And Academy
about: SMS Screen Golf And Academy is an indoor golf training facility featuring premium simulators powered by SMS SCREEN GOLF technology. The venue utilizes high-speed imaging sensor technology to calculate detailed ball metrics and offers access to over 50 international golf courses. With PGA-recognized status and a diverse team of instructors, it caters to golfers of all skill levels seeking to improve their game through advanced analysis and practice modes.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced high-speed imaging technology for precise shot analysis
PGA coaching available for personalized improvement
Diverse practice modes including driving, putting, and chipping
Over 50 international golf courses available for play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides specialized golf equipment for use with their simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so outside items may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole rounds are available, with timing depending on group size and format.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy welcomes junior golfers and offers coaching for all skill levels.
